title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Quick Setup Guide screens loop back to previous screens when swiping left from the fourth screen instead of advancing forward
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the Quick Setup Guide (QSG) screens (e.g., via Home → Account → Quick Setup Guide or similar path).
Swipe left on the fourth (last) QSG screen.
expected: Swiping left on the fourth (last) QSG screen should exit the QSG or show a completion/dismiss action (e.g., "Get Started" button), not navigate back to previous screens.
